* [[松山神社 (匝瑳市)]] - 千葉県匝瑳市鎮座 * [[松山神社 (清須市)]] - [[愛知県]][[清須市]]に鎮座する神社。 * [[松山神社 (大阪市)]] - 大阪府大阪市鎮座 * [[松山神社 (松山市)]] - 愛媛県松山市鎮座 * [[松山神社 (志布志市)]] - 鹿児島県志布志市鎮座

== Matsuyama Shrine (松山神社) ==
'''Matsuyama Shrine''' (松山神社) is the name of multiple **Shinto shrines** in Japan.
* {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Sōsa, Chiba)|ja|松山神社 (匝瑳市)}} – Located in **Sōsa City, Chiba Prefecture**. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Kiyosu, Aichi)|ja|松山神社 (清須市)}} – Located in **Kiyosu City, Aichi Prefecture**. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Osaka, Osaka)|ja|松山神社 (大阪市)}} – Located in **Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture**. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Matsuyama, Ehime)|ja|松山神社 (松山市)}} – Located in **Matsuyama City, Ehime Prefecture**. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Shibushi, Kagoshima)|ja|松山神社 (志布志市)}} – Located in **Shibushi City, Kagoshima Prefecture**.
{{Disambiguation}}
[[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:Matsuyama Shrine]] [[Category:Refresh]] [[Category:Mass bump]] [[Category:Pages needing attribution]] [[ja:松山神社]]

== Matsuyama Shrine (松山神社) ==
'''Matsuyama Shrine''' (松山神社) is the name of multiple '''Shinto shrines''' in Japan.
* {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Sōsa, Chiba)|ja|松山神社 (匝瑳市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuyama Shrine (Sōsa, Chiba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in '''Sōsa City, Chiba Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Kiyosu, Aichi)|ja|松山神社 (清須市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuyama Shrine (Kiyosu, Aichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in '''Kiyosu City, Aichi Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Osaka, Osaka)|ja|松山神社 (大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuyama Shrine (Osaka, Osaka)|1=Matsuyamajinsha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11529909}} – Located in '''Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Matsuyama, Ehime)|ja|松山神社 (松山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuyama Shrine (Matsuyama, Ehime)|1=Matsuyama Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11529911}} – Located in '''Matsuyama City, Ehime Prefecture'''. * {{ill|Matsuyama Shrine (Shibushi, Kagoshima)|ja|松山神社 (志布志市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuyama Shrine (Shibushi, Kagoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in '''Shibushi City, Kagoshima Prefecture'''.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|松山神社|version=101880120|comment=Imported full ja history}}
